candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A row. However, the selected parent row 'Cost of services sold' already appears to include it, because in populated years 'Cost of services sold' equals 'Cost of services sold - other' plus 'Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues' (e.g., 706.53 = 686.4 + 20.14). Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A should be added because the explicit COGS D&A row is a component embedded in the selected COGS parent row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row appears twice and functions as a component beneath the selected SG&A parent rows. For selling and marketing, 59.05 = 58.94 + 0.11; for administrative, 98.52 = 97.93 + 0.59. Therefore these depreciation amounts are already embedded in the selected parent rows and should not be added separately.

This is an explicit R&D D&A component, but the selected parent row 'Research and Development Costs' already includes it, as shown by 14.2 = 14.16 + 0.04. Also, 'Research and Development Costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double counting.

variables.notes: No separate XSGA D&A should be added. The SG&A and R&D depreciation rows are components already included in the selected functional expense rows.
